task_statement: P3 of BRICK 6-surface audit repair: restore Brick return.yaml full return-shape truth for fan-in source Bricks and move downstream concern/carry filtering to Link carry / closure policy. The old observed_evidence,not_proven fan-in source shrink path must be RED; template-full shapes plus filtered carry must be GREEN. This Building also checks that the graph is not Codex-only: Codex and Claude design lanes fan into synthesis, and Codex/Gemini/Claude verification lanes fan into closure through the official build route.
selection_rule: manual graph because P3 is a Brick return-contract plus Link carry/filter boundary repair; preset-only route is not assumed adequate. Uses official brick build declared graph with multi-adapter design/QA where preflight is ok. Chain preset is intentionally blank because the P3 graph uses a non-preset multi-adapter design fan-out/fan-in shape; preset step-template mismatch would be a false declaration. The work/QA lanes must still prove template-full return shape and Link carry filtering.

nodes.work_statement:
Prepare the P3 design split. Read only the P3 phase doc plus cited audit refs and current template/composition/checker surfaces needed for P3. Return the invariant map and dispatch notes for two independent design lanes. Do not edit files. Do not author required_return_shape in graph packets; template return.yaml remains Brick source for return shape.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P3 only. Do not broaden into P4-P8, release/dashboard/provider/pytest honesty, raw scrub, or post-HOLD resume. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep public/operator language build()/brick build only. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; they must not source-mutate customer files. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Codex design lane for P3. Derive the repair design from the phase doc and live code. Must cover: (1) fan-in source Brick required_return_shape comes from brick/templates/bricks/<kind>/return.yaml full shape; (2) operator/customer graph packets cannot author required_return_shape or carries_forward_fields as template authority; (3) transition_concern_evidence suppression is Link carry/closure filtering, not Brick shape shrink; (4) checker-first negative probes for old observed_evidence,not_proven shrink path; (5) focused profile and check_profile.py --all plan. Return design only.

Claude design lane for P3. Independently attack/derive the P3 design from the same phase and audit refs. Focus on Brick/Agent/Link attribution and whether the repair belongs in Brick templates/materialization, Link carry/closure policy, or support checker/composition seams. Return design only and mark not_proven rather than smoothing gaps.

Synthesize the Codex and Claude design lanes into one implementation plan. This is closure-synthesis of design evidence, not success or quality judgment. Ensure the work lane is bounded to P3 and includes checker-first negative probes. If design evidence conflicts or is insufficient, return Link-facing transition_concern_evidence targeting the appropriate upstream design/root Brick; otherwise return null transition_concern_evidence.

Gemini-local design QA. Attack the synthesized design before implementation. Verify Brick return-shape truth stays Brick-owned, Link carry/filtering stays Link/closure-owned, support/checkers remain support evidence, and no graph/manual packet becomes template authority. Do not source-mutate. If a real design/boundary gap remains, return local observation and, if the template permits, non-binding concern evidence with current-building refs only.

Implement P3 from the synthesized/QA-reviewed design. Start checker-first: create or update negative probes so the old fan-in source required_return_shape shrink path (observed_evidence, not_proven or manual transition_concern_evidence removal) is RED, and template-full return.yaml shape plus Link carry/closure filtering is GREEN. Likely surfaces include brick return parsing/materialization, support/operator composition/assembly/driver graph admission, walker carry/closure filtering, and support/checkers/profile coverage. Do not reduce template return.yaml truth. Do not add a new Movement literal, runtime, source truth, success judge, quality judge, or hidden target selector. Run focused checker/profile, py_compile changed Python, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all if feasible. If any implementation gap remains, return transition_concern_evidence targeting this work node.

Codex code attack QA. Inspect the P3 diff and run focused checks. Attack: old shrink path must fail; full template shape must materialize on fan-in source Bricks; customer/operator graph packets cannot author required_return_shape/carries_forward_fields; no checker preserves the old shrink behavior; no unrelated P4-P8 scope changed. QA source mutation is forbidden except probe_write fixtures. If any implementation/boundary/evidence gap remains, return Link-facing transition_concern_evidence targeting brick:brick-6-p3-return-shape-link-carry-0701a-work. proof_limits: official build evidence is support evidence only
P3 closure does not prove P4-P8 or customer-ready whole goal
multi-adapter preflight proves CLI presence/version only, not provider semantic quality or credential validity
checker green is support evidence only
manual graph does not prove preset materializer shape by itself; work/QA must check preset/easy graph surfaces explicitly
not_proven: semantic completeness of all future graph authoring patterns
